Newsletter & Privacy

Subscribe to weekly planning notes. The static site keeps personal data collection minimal.

⌕
2026Public holidays · Events · Countdown intelligence

Newsletter submission requires a future email provider integration. Analytics runs through Google tag G-7D6SE08345.

Privacy Policy

GlobalTick is a static website. It uses local browser storage for language preferences and Google Analytics for aggregate traffic measurement. It does not sell personal data.

GlobalTick

Global holidays, marketing dates, sports, entertainment, tech events and countdowns for 2026.

AboutPrivacySitemapGitHub

Data references: Nager.Date, OpenHolidays, Wikidata, curated public event calendars. © 2026 GlobalTick.
